concept: Discuss / To Build a Shared Bridge
description: The act of talking about something in detail, exploring it from multiple perspectives to build a more complete and shared understanding of the whole.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'sha' (shared), 're' (a bridge), and 'o' (wholeness). The word's structure means 'to build a shared bridge to wholeness.' This frames discussion as a collaborative, constructive process of building understanding together.
